zh.Of Codnor Castle, Derby, Eng: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾可德諾
zh.Holme, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾霍爾梅
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Zouche於大約1455年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir John Zouche53歲，母親Elizabeth Grey42歲。他於大約1478年與Eleanor St John結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1508年8月3日在他的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.Of Codnor Castle, Derby, Eng: 英国英格兰德比夏爾可德諾
zh-hans.Holme, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾霍爾梅
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Zouche于大约1455年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir John Zouche53岁，母亲Elizabeth Grey42岁。他于大约1478年与Eleanor St John结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1508年8月3日在他的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Zaucha
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Casimir, Franciszek, Kazimierz, Krzysztof, Mieczyslaw, Rafal, Wojciech.
Polish: descriptive nickname from za uchem ‘behind the ear’, denoting someone who had something behind one of his ears. Compare Zoucha .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Zouche was born about 1455, in England, his father, Sir John Zouche, was 53 and his mother, Elizabeth Grey, was 42. He married Eleanor St John about 1478. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 3 August 1508, in his hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Zouche est né environ 1455, à Angleterre, son père, Sir John Zouche, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Grey, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor St John environ 1478. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 3 août 1508, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Zouche um 1455 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Zouche 53 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Grey 42. Er hat um 1478 Eleanor St John geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 3. August 1508 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Zouche è nato il circa 1455 nel England, il suo padre, Sir John Zouche, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Grey, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor St John circa 1478. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 3 agosto 1508, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.Codnor, Derbyshire, England: イギリスデルブイシュアイアコドノー
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Zoucheが約1455年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir John Zoucheは53歳，母Elizabeth Greyは42歳であった。約1478年にEleanor St Johnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1508年8月3日に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Zouche(이)가 대략 1455년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Zouche(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Grey(은)는 42세였다. 그는 대략 1478년 Eleanor St John(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1508년 8월 3일 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Of Codnor Castle, Derby, Eng: Codnor, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Holme, Yorkshire, England: Holme, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Zouche nasceu aproximadamente 1455, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Zouche, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Grey, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor St John aproximadamente 1478. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de agosto de 1508, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Zouche родился около 1455 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Zouche было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Grey, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor St John около 1478 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 3 августа 1508 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Zouche nació aproximadamente 1455, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Zouche, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Grey, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Eleanor St John aproximadamente 1478. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 3 de agosto de 1508, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años.
